description: Initial screen state: The user is on the 'Studies' dashboard of Askable. A table lists various research studies with details like Title, Type, Status, and Quota. A sidebar on the left provides navigation to Studies, Participants, Project Delivery, and Docs. A '+ Create' button is visible in the top right corner.
frame_description: The 'Studies' page is displayed with a list of existing research projects.

description: The user hovers over the 'Closing date' column header in the studies table.
frame_description: The cursor pauses briefly over the 'Closing date' header.

description: The user hovers over the 'Flight Centre AU Domestic Booking Flow - Usability' study title in the list.
interaction_target: Flight Centre AU Domestic Booking Flow - Usability
frame_description: The cursor lingers over a specific study title in the table.

description: The user hovers over the 'Daily Poll 80 Incentive Experiment' study title in the list.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and stays over another study title.

description: The user hovers over the '+ Create' button in the top right corner.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue '+ Create' button.

description: The user clicks the '+ Create' button.
frame_description: The user initiates the creation of a new study.

description: A dropdown menu appears with options for different types of research: Interview study, Unmoderated study, Participant recruitment, and Project delivery.
frame_description: The create study dropdown menu is visible.

description: The user hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Interview study' menu item.

description: The user selects 'Interview study' from the menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on 'Interview study'.

description: The application navigates to the study setup page.
frame_description: The page transitions from the studies list to the new study creation flow.

description: The 'Study Setup' page loads, showing the 'Study title' step. The title field is pre-filled with 'Adobe Product Team -026 - 12 participants'.
frame_description: The first step of the study setup process is visible.

description: The user clears the pre-filled text in the study title input field.
frame_description: The title input field is empty again.

description: The user types 'TV Streaming - Discovery' into the study title input field.
frame_description: The user types the new title into the field.

description: The user finishes typing the study title into the input field, changing it from 'TV Streamin' to 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Study title' page of the study setup, completing the title input field.

description: The user hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the black 'Next' button.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the next step.
frame_description: The user clicks 'Next'.

description: The application navigates to the 'Research method' step of the setup.
frame_description: The page transitions to the research method selection step.

description: The screen transitions to a loading state as the next setup step is prepared.
frame_description: The page content disappears, replaced by a white screen and a loading indicator.

description: The 'Research method' step loads, presenting options like Video Call, In-person, Online Task, Survey, and Longitudinal study.
frame_description: The research method selection screen is displayed.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Video Call' research method card.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'Video Call' option under the Moderated section.

description: A horizontal slide transition occurs as the user moves between setup steps.
frame_description: The page content slides to the left as the next section is revealed.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the Research method page.
frame_description: The user activates the 'Next' button to confirm the research method selection.

description: The page navigates to the 'Device' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Device requirements' page loads, presenting options for desktop, mobile, or any device.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Next' button on the Device page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Next' button while the user reviews device options.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Mobile only' device requirement option.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'Mobile only' radio button option.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the Tool selection step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked, confirming the device requirements.

description: The page navigates to the 'Tool' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Tool' page loads, asking which tool will be used to conduct the research.

description: The UI updates to display detailed information about the 'Askable' video call tool.
frame_description: A sidebar or panel appears on the right with details about Askable Sessions.

description: The cursor hovers over the link to use a third-party tool.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the text link 'I want to use a third party tool'.

description: The user clicks the link to reveal third-party tool options.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool
frame_description: The user clicks the link, triggering a UI change.

description: A list of third-party software options (Zoom, Lookback, etc.) appears on the screen.
frame_description: The UI expands to show icons and names of various third-party research tools.

description: A horizontal slide transition occurs as the user moves to the Quota step.
frame_description: The page content slides horizontally during the transition to the next setup phase.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the Quota step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked at the bottom of the Tool page.

description: The page navigates to the 'Quota' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Quota' page loads, asking how many participants are needed.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Next' button on the Quota page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Next' button while the user considers the participant count.

description: The user changes the number of participants from '12' to '5' in the input field.
frame_description: The user clicks into the participant count field, deletes '12', and types '5'.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Next' button after updating the quota.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the 'Next' button.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the Session format step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked, confirming the participant quota.

description: The page navigates to the 'Session format' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Session format' page loads, offering options for individual interviews or focus groups.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Focus Group' session format card.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'Focus Group' option.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the Session duration step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked, confirming the session format.

description: The page navigates to the 'Session duration' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Session duration' page loads, asking how long the sessions will go for.

description: A horizontal slide transition occurs as the user moves to the Session duration step.
frame_description: The page content slides horizontally during the transition.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Next' button on the Session duration page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Next' button while the user reviews the duration.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the Participant selection step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked, confirming the session duration.

description: The page navigates to the 'Participant selection' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Participant selection' page loads, offering options for hand picking or automated selection.

description: A horizontal slide transition occurs as the user moves to the Participant selection step.
frame_description: The page content slides horizontally during the transition.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Hand picking' participant selection card.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'Hand picking' option.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Hand picking' card again.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the 'Hand picking' option as the user makes a final decision.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed from the participant selection step.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Participant selection' page with 'Hand picking' selected. They click the 'Next' button at the bottom left.

description: The page navigates to the audience panel selection step.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the participant selection page to the audience panel selection page.

description: The 'How would you like to source participants for this study?' page loads with 'Askable Panel' selected by default.
frame_description: The audience panel selection page is fully loaded, showing two options: 'Askable Panel' and 'Send a link to your list'.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to confirm the panel selection.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button located below the panel selection cards.

description: The page navigates to the participant location settings.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Participant location' page, confirmed by the scroll-right motion in the optical flow data.

description: The 'Participant location' page loads.
frame_description: The participant location page is visible with an empty location input field and a map placeholder.

description: A location card for 'Australia' appears in the list.
frame_description: A card showing 'Australia' with a delete button appears below the location input field.

description: User types 'Uni' into the location search field.
interaction_target: Type to add more participant locations
frame_description: The user clicks into the location input field and types the first few characters of 'United States'.

description: An autocomplete dropdown menu appears with location suggestions.
frame_description: A dropdown menu appears below the input field showing suggestions like 'USA' and 'United States'.

description: User selects 'United States' from the autocomplete suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'United States' option in the dropdown menu.

description: A location card for 'United States' is added to the list.
frame_description: The 'United States' card appears below the 'Australia' card.

description: User hovers over the 'Delete' button for the Australia location.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and lingers over the delete button next to the Australia entry.

description: User clicks 'Delete' to remove Australia from the participant locations.
frame_description: The user clicks the delete button, and the Australia card is removed from the UI.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to demographic filters.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom left of the location page.

description: The page navigates to demographic filters.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Demographic filters' page, confirmed by optical flow data.

description: The 'Demographic filters' page loads.
frame_description: The demographic filters page is visible, showing options to add filters and exclude previous participants.

description: User clicks the 'Exclude people you've already spoken to' dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks on the dropdown menu which currently shows 'In the last 3 months'.

description: The exclusion period dropdown menu opens.
frame_description: A list of time periods (e.g., 'In the last month', 'In the last 6 months', 'Don't exclude anyone') appears.

description: User selects 'Don't exclude anyone' from the dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Don't exclude anyone' option.

description: The dropdown closes and updates to the selected value.
frame_description: The dropdown menu disappears, and the field now displays 'Don't exclude anyone'.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the custom screener step.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom left.

description: The page navigates to the custom screener creation page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Create a custom screener' page.

description: The 'Create a custom screener' page loads.
frame_description: The custom screener page is visible with a button to add a question.

description: User clicks 'Add a custom screener question'.
frame_description: The user clicks the large button in the center of the page to start adding a question.

description: A modal window titled "Multiple Choice" appears on the screen for the user to create a new screener question.
frame_description: The 'Multiple Choice' modal is displayed over the 'Custom screener' page.

description: User hovers over the 'Multiple choice' question type option.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the 'Multiple choice' option in the question type menu.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' as the question type.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Multiple choice' option.

description: A modal form for creating a multiple-choice question appears.
frame_description: A modal overlay opens with fields for 'Screener question', 'Add a description', and 'Answers'.

description: The user types the question "Which best describes you habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?" into the "Screener question" input field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the question field in the multiple-choice modal.

description: The user types "I don't use them at all" into the first answer input field.
frame_description: The user is entering the first answer option.

description: The user types "I use them daily" into the third answer input field.
frame_description: The user is entering the third answer option.

description: The user clicks the "Save" button to add the multiple-choice question to the screener.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the modal.

description: The "Multiple Choice" modal closes, and the newly created question is displayed in the "Custom screener" section of the page.
frame_description: The modal closes, returning to the main screener setup page.

description: The user clicks the "+ Add another custom question" link to open the question type selection menu.
frame_description: The user clicks the link to add a second question.

description: A dropdown menu appears with options for "Multiple choice", "Short answer", and "Copy from other study".
frame_description: A small menu opens below the 'Add another custom question' link.

description: The cursor lingers over the 'Short answer' option in the question type menu.
frame_description: The 'Create a custom screener' page is visible with a dropdown menu open showing question types.

description: User selects the 'Short answer' question type.
frame_description: The user clicks on 'Short answer' in the dropdown menu.

description: User types the question text into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user types 'What is the name of your favourite TV show that you're watching right now?' into the text area.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button in the modal.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the green 'Save' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The modal closes and the new question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The modal disappears, returning focus to the main 'Create a custom screener' page.

description: User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the link to add a new question.

description: A dropdown menu with question types appears.
frame_description: A small menu opens below the '+ Add another custom question' link.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the question type menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on 'Multiple choice' in the dropdown menu.

description: A modal window titled 'Multiple Choice' appears.
frame_description: A new modal overlay appears for configuring a multiple-choice question.

description: User types the multiple-choice question text.
frame_description: The user types 'Which streaming service are you using most right now?' into the question field.

description: User types the first answer option.
frame_description: The user types 'Netflix' into the first answer field.

description: User types the third answer option.
frame_description: The user types 'Disney+' into the third answer field.

description: User types the fourth answer option.
frame_description: The user types 'Prime Video' into the fourth answer field.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button in the multiple-choice modal.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the green 'Save' button.

description: The modal closes and the multiple-choice question is added to the list.
frame_description: The modal disappears, showing the updated list of screener questions.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: The page navigates to the 'Additional Info' section, specifically the 'Your Timezone' step.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Your Timezone' configuration page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the timezone page.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Next' button.

description: The page navigates to the 'Your Timezone' section under Additional Info.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the timezone selection page.

description: User types 'Do you watch TV on streaming services?' into the short description field.
interaction_target: Short description of who you're looking for (Required)
frame_description: The user is typing into the text area on the Description page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The user has finished typing the description.

frame_description: The calendar updates with the second Thursday slot.

description: User clicks on the calendar to add a session slot for Friday 27th at 9:30 AM.
frame_description: The user clicks again on the Friday column.

description: A third session slot appears on the calendar for Friday 27th.
frame_description: The calendar updates with the third Friday slot.

description: User clicks on the calendar to add a session slot for Friday 27th at 1:30 PM.
frame_description: The user clicks a fourth time on the Friday column.

description: The page navigates to the 'Review & Submit' step.

description: User scrolls down the review page to check the study details.

description: User clicks the 'Submit study' button.

description: The page navigates to the study overview page after successful submission.
